ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_chart" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size designation for the clothing */,
  "height_range" TEXT /* Height range suitable for the size */,
  "weight_range" TEXT /* Weight range suitable for the size */,
  "chest_size" TEXT /* Chest measurement for the size */,
  "waist_size" TEXT /* Waist measurement for the size */,
  "hip_size" TEXT /* Hip measurement for the size */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for which the size is suitable */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is designed for (boys, girls, both) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type of the size (e.g., slim, regular, relaxed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., shirts, pants) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size from the size chart */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "target_age_group" TEXT /* Target age group for the product (e.g., toddler, child, pre-teen) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type of the product (e.g., slim, regular, relaxed) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_chart ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_status" TEXT /* Shipping status of the order (e.g., shipped, delivered, returned) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the ordered product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the ordered product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order item details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product whose inventory is being tracked */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, sale) */,
  "change_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the inventory change */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the inventory log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the return */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being returned */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, processed, refunded) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the return details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the day */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders on the day */,
  "top_selling_product" TEXT /* Top-selling product of the day */,
  "top_selling_size" TEXT /* Top-selling size of the day */,
  "top_selling_color" TEXT /* Top-selling color of the day */,
  "average_order_value" REAL /* Average order value of the day */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sales report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for accessing the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, staff) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password change */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
